name: energy_recall_notice_arrives_marrowbridge_rig_utl
premise: A Energy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving energy recall notice arrives marrowbridge rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Nadia Rahman
agents.identity: I am Nadia Rahman, accountable for a defensible call in Energy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Nadia Park
agents.identity: I am Nadia Park, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Energy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Nadia Rahman must decide under rights vs utility. What does Nadia Rahman do?
